title: Usopp Boasts Before the Straw Hats
description: On pages 1–4, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain......!!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: You said pirates are "brave warriors of the sea"?

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Don't twist the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: It's because you have that kind of savage bloodline...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: That you like to lie so much!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: And use violence whenever you are enraged...

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: I believe you only get close to Ojousama for the money...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: What the hell are you talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Who cares what your motive is,

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: The fact that your father is a pirate is more than enough reason for me to kick you out!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I dare you to say that again!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: USOPPP- San, Please stop!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Please dont use V10- Lance...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Claha- DOR....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Isn't a bad person...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's just con- Carned about me...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: That's why he's a little extreme...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Get the hell out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: SAVAGES LIKE YOU ARE NOT WELCOME HERE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll let you off this time, but I warn you... don't come here again!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Fine... I under- stand...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I'll leave even without you telling me to!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: I'll never come back here again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: usopp- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You bastard! Captain is not that kind of person!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Yeah! Stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Baaaka!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: BAAAKA!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Why are you screaming along with them?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
